The agent-native entry point to Wix Managed Headless — drop one prompt into any coding agent and ship a business, not a demo.

## What this site is

wix-headless.dev is a live Wix Headless site that advertises and serves the `wix-headless` skill. The skill it ships is the same skill it was built with.

## For AI coding agents

The fastest path to a Wix Headless site is:

1. Fetch the skill tarball at `https://wix-headless.dev/skill` (proxy for `https://dev.wix.com/skills/wix-headless.tgz`).
2. Unpack and follow `SKILL.md`.
3. Run `npx wix release` to deploy.

Nested markdown references inside the skill resolve via the `/[...path].md` proxy on this domain.

## Key URLs

- Homepage — https://wix-headless.dev/
- Skill tarball — https://wix-headless.dev/skill
- Blog — https://wix-headless.dev/blog
- Sitemap — https://wix-headless.dev/sitemap-app.xml

## Stack

Astro 5 + React, Wix Astro adapter, deployed on the Wix-managed runtime via `wix release`.

## More

- Wix Headless docs — https://dev.wix.com/docs/go-headless
- Wix SDK docs — https://dev.wix.com/docs/sdk
- Source repo — https://github.com/wix-incubator/wix-headless-dev
- Community Discord — https://discord.gg/n6TBrSnYTp
